crdt_merge.nfrTitle: Sync convergence after reconnect (1k pending samples)
crdt_merge.rationale: Microbench ceiling for the worst-case CRDT merge size in the file (200 concepts / 1k samples). Full end-to-end 1k-sample SLA stays NFR-03 ≤10s (endurance proofs).

memory_retrieval.nfrTitle: Core composition overhead (loop excluding bound-implementation time)
memory_retrieval.rationale: On-device LocalVectorDb search over the documented ≤20k corpus. Gate uses max p95 across sizes in the file. Loop composition itself is gated by core_loop under the same NFR-06 row.

sync_roundtrip.nfrTitle: Sync convergence after reconnect (1k pending samples)
sync_roundtrip.rationale: In-process push+merge round-trip (no network). Composition regresses here must fail CI before the 10s reconnect SLA is approached.

core_loop.nfrTitle: Core composition overhead (loop excluding bound-implementation time)
core_loop.rationale: Direct PRD_MATRIX NFR-06 mapping: ≤10ms p95 per turn excluding bound-implementation time.

router.rationale: Task-router assess_friction → route decision on the demo graph (incl. remediation depth breaker). Measures routing composition only — zero model generation. Direct PRD_MATRIX NFR-04 ≤50ms p95.

agent_turn.nfrTitle: Core composition overhead (loop excluding bound-implementation time)
agent_turn.rationale: Full CognitiveCore.turn perceive→reflect with contract-complete zero-sleep mocks. Measures composition overhead only (NFR-06 ≤10ms p95); model/reasoning bindings return instantly.

py_sync_merge.nfrTitle: Sync convergence after reconnect (1k pending samples)
py_sync_merge.rationale: Python crdt_merge.merge_states parity with JS crdt_merge microbench (max p95 across sizes). Consumed via check.mjs python spawn + bench.mjs-compatible JSON.

py_agent_runtime.nfrTitle: Core composition overhead (loop excluding bound-implementation time)
py_agent_runtime.rationale: Python AgentRuntime.run_turn with DeterministicFakeProvider (zero-sleep). Measures cloud turn-handler composition; check.mjs parses unified p95 capture.

sync_convergence.nfrTitle: Sync convergence after reconnect (1k pending samples)
sync_convergence.rationale: End-to-end POST /v1/sync with 1k pending friction samples on compose orchestrator (SUTRA_ORCHESTRATOR_URL). In-process SyncEngine floor when compose is absent — full NFR-03 SLA requires docker-compose.
